hooks.command: echo "Project: $(basename $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)) | Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A') | Ruby: $(ruby -v 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f2 || echo 'N/A') | Rails: $(bundle exec rails -v 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f2 || echo 'N/A') | Pending migrations: $(bundle exec rails db:migrate:status 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'down' || echo '0')"
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.rb ]] && bundle exec rubocop -a "$FILE" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty') && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.erb ]] && bundle exec erblint --autocorrect "$FILE" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty') && if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(rm\s+-rf\s+[/~]|DROP\s+TABLE|DROP\s+DATABASE|git\s+push\s+.*(-f|--force)\s+.*(main|master|production)|chmod\s+777)'; then echo 'Blocked: This command is potentially destructive. Please confirm with the user before proceeding.' >&2; exit 2; fi

TASK=$(cat | jq -r '.task.description // empty') && if echo "$TASK" | grep -qiE '(implement|create|add|build|write|fix|refactor|update|migrate|change|move|extract)'; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Before marking complete: verify tests pass (bundle exec rspec) and linting is clean (bundle exec rubocop). If you have not run these checks, do so now."}'; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude has finished responding" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
